case_title: ALEXANDRE FARIA GAPPO PRATA VS. JUNG R WI

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION UPDATED ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARIA GAPPO PRATA, ALEXANDRE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARIA GAPPO PRATA, ALEXANDRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANYTY HART, JOSE $1,615.20 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,690.20, COST OF TICKET; FASTRACK VIOLATIONS, DECREASED VALUE IN MILEAGE USAGE AND PAIN AND SUFFERING. THE CLAIM VS. JUNG WI DBA AUTOBODY SPA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE CLAIM IS AMENDED TO NAME DEFENDANT JOSE ANYTY HART AS THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT WI, JUNG R D.B.A. AUTOBOY SPA
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FARIA GAPPO PRATA, ALEXANDRE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALEXANDRE FARIA GAPPO PRATA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER JOSEPH MESA. DEFENDANT JUNGRYANG WI DBA AS AUTOBODY SPA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS JOSE ANYTY HART. HONORABLE MICHELLE DISMISSES THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT JUNGRYANG WI AND AMENDS THE COMPLAINT TO ADD DEFENDANT JOSE ANYTY HART AS THE CORRECT DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-26-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WI, JUNG R D.B.A. AUTOBOY SPA
DECLARATION OF ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANYTY HART, JOSE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FARIA GAPPO PRATA, ALEXANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT WI, JUNG R D.B.A. AUTOBOY SPA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
